message:
feat: add story cards for CLI, web, and TUI e2e tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+---
+id: bc-arithmetic-pass
+title: bc performs basic arithmetic
+status: ready
+tags: cli, smoke
+---
+
+# bc performs basic arithmetic
+
+The bc calculator should accept arithmetic expressions and return correct results.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+
+- bc accepts input on stdin
+- Addition works correctly (2+3 produces 5)
+- Multiplication works correctly (6*7 produces 42)
+- Division works correctly (10/2 produces 5)

@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+---
+id: bc-help-fail
+title: bc displays a help menu
+status: ready
+tags: cli, expected-fail
+---
+
+# bc displays a help menu
+
+The bc calculator should have a built-in help command that describes available operations.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+
+- Typing "help" displays a list of available commands
+- The help output describes arithmetic operations
+- The help output mentions available functions

@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+---
+id: nano-open-save-pass
+title: User can open, edit, and save files in nano
+status: ready
+tags: tui, smoke
+---
+
+# User can open, edit, and save files in nano
+
+The nano text editor should allow users to open a file, edit its contents, and save changes.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+
+- Opening a file displays its contents in the editor
+- The user can type text to insert content
+- The bottom of the screen shows keyboard shortcuts
+- Ctrl+O triggers the save operation

@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+---
+id: nano-tabs-fail
+title: nano supports tabbed editing
+status: ready
+tags: tui, expected-fail
+---
+
+# nano supports tabbed editing
+
+The nano editor should support opening multiple files in tabs for easy switching.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+
+- Multiple files can be opened in separate tabs
+- A tab bar is visible showing open files
+- The user can switch between tabs
+- Closing a tab returns to the previous tab

@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+---
+id: todomvc-add-pass
+title: User can add todo items
+status: ready
+tags: web, smoke
+---
+
+# User can add todo items
+
+Users should be able to add new todo items to the list using the input field.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+
+- An input field is visible for entering new todos
+- Typing text and pressing Enter adds the item to the list
+- The item count updates to reflect the new total
+- Multiple items can be added sequentially

@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+---
+id: todomvc-edit-fail
+title: User can edit existing todos
+status: ready
+tags: web, expected-fail
+---
+
+# User can edit existing todos
+
+Users should be able to edit the text of existing todo items by double-clicking on them.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+
+- Double-clicking a todo item enters edit mode
+- The todo text becomes editable in an input field
+- Pressing Enter saves the edited text
+- Pressing Escape cancels the edit and reverts changes

@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@
+---
+id: todomvc-filter-pass
+title: User can filter todos by status
+status: ready
+tags: web, smoke
+---
+
+# User can filter todos by status
+
+Users should be able to filter the todo list to show all, active, or completed items.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+
+- Filter buttons for All, Active, and Completed are visible
+- Clicking Active shows only incomplete items
+- Clicking Completed shows only completed items
+- Clicking All shows all items regardless of status
+- The item count always reflects the number of active (incomplete) items
